question_html:
Correctly rewrite the sentences provided below.

(a) It is high time you go home.

(b) The police is coming.

(c) He is as taller as his brother.

(d) It’s been raining since three days.

(e) One of the student is absent.
solution_html:
(a) It is high time you went home.

(b) The police are coming.

(c) He is as tall as his brother.

(d) It’s been raining for three days.

(e) One of the students is absent.

(0.5× 5) =2.5 marks for re-write the correct form of the following sentences

question_html:
Explain the following words within one sentence.

Novice, Philogynist, Bibliophile, Xenophobe, Tyrant
solution_html:
Novice – A beginner with little experience.

Philogynist – A person who loves or admires women.

Bibliophile – A person who loves books.

Xenophobe – A person who fears or dislikes foreigners.

Tyrant – A cruel and oppressive ruler.

Marks Distribution:

(0.5× 5) =2.5 marks for Explain within one sentence.

question_html: Write a paragraph on ‘The Importance of Time Management’ within 100 words.
solution_html:
The Importance of Time Management

Time management is essential for success in every stage of life. Time is precious and once wasted, it can never be recovered. Proper use of time enables students to complete lessons, revise, and still enjoy leisure. In contrast, misuse of time brings stress, failure, and regret. In professional life, time management helps to meet deadlines, increase productivity, and maintain discipline. It also builds qualities like punctuality and responsibility. History shows that successful people achieved greatness by valuing time. In today’s competitive world, managing time wisely is not optional but necessary. Therefore, we should plan our daily tasks, set priorities, and avoid procrastination to make the best use of every moment.

Marks Distribution:

0.5 mark for writing the Title, “The Importance of Time Management”

1.5 marks for writing Time management is essential for success in every stage of life.

1.5 marks for writing proper use of time.

1.5 marks for writing use of time also builds qualities like punctuality and responsibility.

[Instructions:

* Students must write it within one single para. If it becomes more than one para, 50% marks have to be deducted from the obtained marks.

* Students must write it within 100 words limit. For exceeding the 100 words limit, 0.5 mark have to be deducted from the deserved marks.

* 0.5 mark will be deducted for one or two grammar or spelling mistakes, 01 mark for three or more grammar or spelling mistakes
